---
pagetitle: "The Establishment"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero-band}
::: {.hero-copy}
<div class="hero-title" role="heading" aria-level="1">The Establishment</div>

Run a four-round local game without paper scorekeeping. The web referee handles setup, faction decks, storyline flow, support placement, guided resolution, XP, and save/resume.

[Play the web game](webgame/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Read the roadmap](roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light .btn-lg}
:::

::: {.hero-cards}
<img src="__docs__/cards/faction/faction-000_B.png" alt="Faction card back">
<img src="__docs__/cards/faction/faction-001_B.png" alt="Faction card back">
<img src="__docs__/cards/faction/faction-002_B.png" alt="Faction card back">
<img src="__docs__/cards/faction/faction-003_B.png" alt="Faction card back">
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Current Focus

The first product target is a polished single-device local referee. Online multiplayer and Discord Activity support stay in the planning lane until the local game can be completed without physical cards.

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-item}
### Playable App

The custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript game remains in `webgame/` so it can keep its own interaction model and assets.
:::

::: {.feature-item}
### Product Roadmap

The docs shell links the local-referee roadmap and future multiplayer plan without duplicating their source content.
:::

::: {.feature-item}
### Static Deployment Path

Quarto renders the public site into `_site/` and carries the playable app plus card assets as static resources.
:::
:::
:::
